description_long: This is a large, modern school complex featuring multiple interconnected buildings, green lawns, and outdoor recreational areas. The main entrance is marked by a prominent gate and a central road that divides the campus, with several parking lots and landscaped pathways. The school grounds include sports courts, a swimming pool, and various garden spaces, all surrounded by fencing and trees for privacy and security. The buildings are primarily rectangular with flat roofs, large windows, and a mix of white, gray, and brown exterior finishes. Outdoor seating areas and shaded walkways are visible, providing spaces for students to gather. The overall layout is organized and spacious, reflecting a contemporary approach to educational architecture.
description: A modern school campus with multiple flat-roofed buildings, sports facilities, and landscaped outdoor areas, organized around a central road and entrance gate.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance gate, central road, and a clear view of the main school buildings and landscaped lawns.
description_view_1: View from the opposite side, highlighting the central road, parking areas, and the rear facades of the school buildings.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyards, sports courts, swimming pool, and additional green spaces behind the main buildings.
description_view_3: Side view focusing on the length of the central road, the arrangement of buildings on either side, and the overall campus layout.
